content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.20%, Auto leading +2.19%, Realty +2.20%, IT +1.39%, and VIX cooling -5.93%. Multiple sectors participating with positive earnings tailwind (Bandhan, Maruti, Sun Pharma deal, Coal India). However, my book is already 50% deployed with strong unrealized gains across 8 names — focus shifts to PROTECTING gains via SL trails, not adding exposure into a gap-up day.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+7.9% unrealized; current SL 1040.56 is already above entry (good). Tightening slightly to 1045 (just below today's VWAP 1049.94 and intraday consolidation support) locks in ~6.2% gain. Target 1110 intact — strong momentum after Q4 beat (PAT +18%, GNPA <1%). Risk-reward still favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+3.4% unrealized at 52-week high. Current SL 1438 is just above entry. Tightening to 1442 (just below today's VWAP 1451 and intraday support 1446-1448). Strong Q4 (PAT +27% YoY) supports continued upside; defensive FMCG holding well in any volatility."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+3.0% unrealized; broke out to new 52-week high on Q4 beat (+11% PAT) and Rs 5.25 dividend. Tightening SL from 475 to 478 (just below today's VWAP 478.39 and intraday consolidation). Locks in ~2% gain while leaving room to MOFSL's 12% upside target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+1.2% unrealized. Tomorrow (Apr 30) is dividend record date — stock will mechanically drop ~Rs 11 ex-dividend on May 2. Current SL 614 is already above entry and tight. Holding through ex-dividend; a MODIFY tightening further risks getting stopped on the technical ex-div drop. SL 614 covers the position; will reassess post ex-div."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.8% unrealized; SL at entry (404.50) — already at breakeven. Stock near 52-week high; Q4 results May 15. Not enough cushion to trail tighter without risking a noise-stop. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+1.0% unrealized; SL 1742 already locks in ~Rs 8 above entry. Big Organon acquisition creates execution risk and the MACD shows bearish crossover. Will not loosen, will not tighten further (intraday range 1750-1764 — tighter SL gets stopped on noise). Monitor; consider exit if SL hits."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.4% unrealized; SL 318.50 just below entry. Stock at 52w high, peak power demand record (256 GW) supportive. Q4 results May 19 — patient hold; not enough move to trail aggressively without getting stopped on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-2.2% unrealized; defensive hedge. Fed decision today could swing gold either way. SL 119 (~3% below CMP) is reasonable. Holding hedge into Fed event — exiting now removes the diversifier just when uncertainty is peaking."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.5% gap-up to fresh 52w high after Q4 beat. Chasing a 10% post-results gap is the textbook bad entry — risk-reward inverted at these levels. Wait for a pullback to 185-190 zone before considering."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.5% gap-up on crude spike. Adding here would extend my energy/oil cluster (already long NTPC, COALINDIA, POWERGRID, RELIANCE-adjacent themes). Cluster discipline + chasing extended move = pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VEDL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Demerger eligibility cutoff today + Q4 results today + ex-date tomorrow = triple-event volatility. Price discovery for the 5 entities post-record-date is unpredictable. This is gambling, not investing. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4% intraday but Q4 PAT was -12.5% YoY. Chasing post-result gap-up after disappointing earnings is a fade setup, not entry. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -6.4% YoY despite revenue growth — margin pressure flagged. Stock fell 2% post-result on Apr 28 then bounced today; choppy reaction. Not a clean setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Despite Q4 turnaround, SFIO probe and Rs 1,979 cr accounting fraud overhang make this uninvestible at this size. Governance risk too elevated."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results post-market today — event risk. Premium valuation leaves no room for AUM miss. Wait for results clarity."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY @ 2400 from earlier session — pharma sector context shifted with Sun Pharma's Organon deal dominating sector attention. Setup deteriorated; cancel rather than let stale order stack risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY @ 23.65 sitting unfilled for 53 hours. Pharma index only +0.42% today (laggard); thesis stale. Cancel to free capital and clean order book."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY @ 443 unfilled for ~55 hours. Already long power cluster (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA) — adding TATAPOWER would breach cluster discipline. Cancel."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to 1045 (~6.2% gain locked) to protect biggest winner."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL just below intraday support; defensive name at 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail to 478 — just below today's VWAP after Q4 breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend tomorrow will mechanically drop price ~Rs 11; do NOT tighten SL into that drop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; insufficient cushion to trail tighter."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry; Organon deal execution risk warrants caution but not exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small unrealized gain; SL near entry adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge into Fed decision; SL appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK, ONGC, COALINDIA-adds, RELIANCE — wait for pullbacks. BAJFINANCE post-results (Apr 30 reaction). HINDZINC post ex-div re-entry potential if it holds Rs 600 zone.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 50% deployed with +1.21% unrealized P&L on the day. Strong tape (Nifty +1.2%, VIX -6%) but multiple stocks gapped up — chasing into gaps is the failure mode I want to avoid. Energy/PSU cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) already at ~16% of book; explicitly avoiding adding ONGC/RELIANCE today on cluster discipline. Cancelling 3 stale pending orders cleans up the book and frees ~Rs 150K of intent-capital. Priority remains: protect the +12K unrealized via SL trails on the three winners (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, COALINDIA). 5-day performance shows 14% win rate and 0.4x profit factor — exactly why we're being defensive today rather than adding new names."
}
